text:

Author: pi

Log:
  New port: net/p5-TFTP

  TFTP is a class implementing a simple
  TFTP client in Perl as described in RFC783.

  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/TFTP/

  PR:		209254
  Submitted by:	Rihaz Jerrin <rihaz.jerrin@gmail.com>

  head/net/p5-TFTP/
